agents.note: Sprint 31 / Session 183 -- US-319 SHIPPED passes:true. B-071 forensic instrumentation at 4 surfaces, all on a stable `FORENSIC <surface>` journalctl-grep token: (1) detector.py +17 LOC -- `FORENSIC drive_check` per RPM tick (RPM+SPEED+state+threshold-check-results+drive_id) at _processRpmValue + `FORENSIC drive_state_transition` (from/to/drive_id) at _transitionState; (2) drive_summary.py +12 LOC -- `FORENSIC drive_summary_writer_entry` (drive_id+from_state+snapshot_keys+force_insert) at captureDriveStart before the INSERT/UPSERT/defer decision; (3) server analysis.py +9 LOC -- `FORENSIC ensureDriveSummary_entry` (drive_id+device+start+end) at _ensureDriveSummary entry; (4) sync client.py +32 LOC -- `FORENSIC sync_push_table_entry` (table+pk+supports_update_sync) at pushDelta + `FORENSIC sync_push_table_advance` (table+old/new id+old/new modified_at+rows) after dual-cursor advance + `FORENSIC sync_push_drive_counter` (last_drive_id) before pushDriveCounter POST. Did NOT add ApplicationOrchestrator-warm-restart-init surface (B-071 Â§1 4th bullet) -- lifecycle.py not in scope.filesToTouch; future story. Sprint 31 now 2/2 passes:true -- PRD COMPLETE. agents.name: Agent2
agents.note: Sprint 25 / Session 158 -- US-286 SHIPPED passes:true. tests/pi/integration/test_engine_drive_capture_e2e.py (1 class / 1 test / 7 phases): real ApplicationOrchestrator + DriveDetector + SummaryRecorder + ObdDataLogger; mock surface = connection.obd.query (BT edge) only; 0.16s call duration vs 30-sec budget. Mirrors US-260 cold-start pattern. Discriminator: would FAIL against May-4-5 production regression class (DriveDetector never operational) + against any silent realtime_data write regression. Two gotchas surfaced for future tests: (1) e2e fixtures must seed profiles('daily') because realtime_data has FK + bare orchestrator doesn't run ProfileManager; (2) production order query->logReading->_handleReading means first N ticks land with drive_id NULL -- query realtime_data without drive_id filter. Standing by post-US-286.
